title: Data-Driven Leadership Skills Course 2: Agile Leadership
description: In this course, we describe how agility became increasingly important in the 21st Century. We explore the role of information communication in disrupting hierarchical leadership. We will explore the Volatile, Uncertain, Complex and Ambiguous (VUCA) world of the 21st Century and look at how the traditional discipline of strategic planning is adapting under the turbulence of the data deluge. We will be looking at the rise of exploratory strategy.
duration: This course is comprised of 3 weeks, and each week requires between 3 to 4 hours of study.
